description: Comprehensive SEC filings risk/opportunity scanner. Searches EDGAR full-text for 14 institutional alpha signals across 8-K/10-Q/Form 4/13F/S-3: going concern, CFO departures, restatements, investigations, M&A deals, FDA approvals, buybacks, dilution. Per-ticker composite + per-event drill-down.

schedule.description: SEC filings scanner — 3x daily 9/15/21 UTC (covers pre-market, mid-day, post-close)
